indicators.name: white couches
indicators.rationale: Couches are not suitable for extended computer work as they lack a flat surface for a keyboard and monitor.

indicators.name: glass coffee table
indicators.rationale: A glass coffee table is not stable enough for a laptop and peripheral devices.

indicators.name: low lighting
indicators.rationale: The lighting is insufficient for extended computer work, as it does not provide adequate task illumination.

indicators.name: open kitchen area
indicators.rationale: An open kitchen area can be a source of distraction and noise, which is detrimental to focused computer work.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). The presence of white couches and a glass coffee table makes it difficult to set up a proper workstation. The low lighting and open kitchen area also contribute to a less than ideal environment for focused solo work.
